The shop
  • Established2014
  • NeighborhoodWilliamsburg
  • ChairsSix
  • Open7 days

Built around the chair

Forge began as a two-chair shop a block off the Williamsburg waterfront, run by barbers tired of rushed, assembly-line haircuts. Take your time, get it right, and send people back out feeling like themselves.

A decade on, the room is larger but the rule is unchanged. Every barber is state-licensed and trained in-house — and we keep our own blades sharp and the towels hot.

— The Forge barbers
Drop a photo of the shop / owner
The room · 212 Wythe Avenue, Brooklyn
What we do

Services

Honest barbering, done properly. Every cut finishes with a hot-towel neck-shave and a clean line.

01

Signature Cut

A full consultation and a scissor or clipper cut tailored to your hair, finished with a hot-towel neck shave.

02

Skin & Taper Fades

Clean, blended fades from a subtle taper to a bald skin fade — by hand, never rushed.

03

Hot-Towel Shave

The traditional straight-razor shave: hot towels, pre-shave oil, a proper lather and a cooling finish.

04

Beard Sculpt

Shaping, line-up and razor detailing to keep the shape sharp between cuts. Conditioning included.

05

Cut & Beard Combo

The full reset — a signature cut paired with a beard sculpt, timed for one sitting.

06

The Little Gents

Patient, no-pressure cuts for kids. First haircut? We make it a good memory, not a battle.

The difference

Why Forge

No upsells, no clock-watching. Just barbers who care how you walk out the door.

Licensed, trained in-house

Every barber holds a New York license and trains on our own standards before taking a paying chair.

We take our time

One barber, one chair, one client — never double-booked. A real consultation and an unrushed cut.

A neighborhood room

Coffee on, records playing, no attitude. Regulars and first-timers get the same welcome.

Walk in or book ahead

Drop by when a chair's open, or reserve your usual barber online in under a minute.

No surprises

How it works

From first message to fresh cut in three steps — here's exactly what happens.

I

Book or walk in

Reserve a time online, or simply drop by — walk-ins are welcome whenever a chair is open.

II

The consultation

Your barber discusses what you'd like, considers your hair and head shape, and agrees the plan first.

III

Cut, finish, done

Cut, style, a hot-towel finish and a look in the mirror. We'll see you again in a few weeks.

In their words

The regulars

Fresh from the chair

The work

Cuts, fades and the room — hover a frame. Drop your own photos straight in.

Good to know

FAQ

Still wondering about something? Message the shop — we'll get straight back to you.

Do I need an appointment?

No — walk-ins are always welcome whenever a chair's free. If you'd rather guarantee a time with your usual barber, you can book a chair online in under a minute.

What are your opening hours?

We're open seven days a week. Live, current hours are shown on our Google Business listing and at the bottom of this page.

Do you cut all hair types?

Yes. Our barbers are trained across straight, wavy, curly and coily hair, and across clipper, scissor and razor work.

Can you cut kids' hair?

Absolutely — "The Little Gents" is a patient, no-pressure cut made for younger clients, including nervous first-timers.

How do I pay?

We take cards, contactless and cash in the shop. Booking online doesn't require payment up front — you settle after your cut.

Where exactly are you and is there parking?

We're on Wythe Avenue in Williamsburg, a short walk from the Bedford Av subway. Metered street parking is usually available nearby.

Who we serve

Service area

Most of our regulars travel in from across north Brooklyn and lower Manhattan. If you're nearby, you're covered.

Williamsburg
Greenpoint
Bushwick
Bedford-Stuyvesant
DUMBO
Long Island City
Lower East Side
East Williamsburg
Hard trust

Credentials

The boring-but-important stuff. Fully licensed, insured and inspected — so you can just enjoy the cut.

NY State Licensed

Every barber holds a current New York State barbering license.

Fully Insured

Public liability cover in place for every chair, every visit.

Health Inspected

Sterilised tools and single-use blades, to NYC sanitation code.

Certified Educators

Senior barbers are accredited to train and assess apprentices.

Come in

Find the shop

On Wythe Avenue, between N 11th and N 12th. Walk in, or book your chair before you head over.
